classified_actions.rationale: Current certified runtime state is required before production governance conclusions.
This duplicates the explicit ACLI regression certification review and certification artifact references.
classified_actions.recommended_change: Fold into a single certification-ledger review action.

classified_actions.rationale: Regression certification is a direct readiness gate and should remain explicit.
Input capture is required for deterministic reconstruction and replay continuity.
The requested artifact is the governed output of the economics runtime.

classified_actions.action: Human approved supervised production adoption milestone
classified_actions.rationale: Human authority must remain explicit for supervised production adoption.
The human prompt already authorizes measurement; tracking it again as a separate approval inflates operator effort.
classified_actions.recommended_change: Represent measurement authorization as the originating human prompt, not an additional approval action.

classified_actions.rationale: Readiness evidence is a source governance artifact for the supervised adoption chain.
Adoption evidence is the source artifact that exposed the economics gap.
The test is necessary validation evidence, but it can be referenced from validation evidence rather than counted as replay overhead in the economics comparison.
classified_actions.recommended_change: Move guard-test references to validation evidence and keep replay artifact lists focused on source governance artifacts.

classified_actions.rationale: Regression certification must remain an explicit governance gate.
Replay certification must remain explicit to preserve replay-derived loop integrity.

recommended_optimizations.name: Certification Ledger Review Consolidation
recommended_optimizations.action: Replace separate certified-runtime, certification-artifact, and ACLI-regression review prompts with one checklist-driven certification-ledger review while preserving all source artifact references.

recommended_optimizations.name: Prompt-as-Approval Measurement Authorization
recommended_optimizations.action: Treat explicit human measurement requests as authorization evidence instead of creating a second approval action for the same measurement.
required_preservation: fail-closed handling when approval is absent

recommended_optimizations.name: Replay Artifact Scope Separation
recommended_optimizations.action: Keep replay artifact lists focused on source governance artifacts and move guard-test references into validation evidence fields.

non_goals: Do not remove human approval for supervised production adoption.
Do not replace deterministic evidence with provider-side assertions.

implementation_guidance.next_step: Update the economics runtime input model to distinguish source replay artifacts from validation artifacts and to collapse prompt-authorized measurements into human prompt evidence.
